conservative.name: Martyr's Touch
conservative.requirements: 4 favour. Engaged with target (you may not target yourself)

success.description: You sacrifice some of your own health to heal the target. You suffer 1 wound; the target recovers 3 wounds
You suffer 2 wounds; the target recovers 5 wounds
You suffer 3 wounds; the target recovers 7 wounds

boon.description: One of your target's critical wounds with a severity no greater than the total number of rolled is turned face down into a normal wound

sigmarsComet.description: You suffer 1 fatigue; the target recovers 3 fatigue
You suffer 1 stress; the target recovers 3 stress

reckless.name: Martyr's Touch
reckless.requirements: 4 favour. Engaged with target (you may not target yourself)

success.description: You suffer 1 wound; the target recovers 2 wounds
You suffer 3 wounds; the target recovers 6 wounds
You suffer 5 wounds; the target recovers 10 wounds

boon.description: One of your target's critical wounds with a severity no greater than the total number of rolled is turned face down into a normal wound

sigmarsComet.description: Special: You must use the highest possible success line. (But you do not have to count as unless you choose to)
You suffer 1 fatigue; the target recovers 3 fatigue
You suffer 1 stress; the target recovers 3 stress
